description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/keithwberry/connectiq:latest Docker image. Define two stages named build and release. In the build stage add a build job that runs the shell command "make test" and publishes any PNG files under test_results/ as artifacts. In the release stage add a release job that runs the shell command "make package" and publishes the generated .iq files under bin/ as artifacts.
